meta.notes:
Dimensity 8400U 
12gb RAM 
Mali 720 MC7


Tested on a  maxed out, but I would recommend tweaking specific settings like physics, shadows, reflections, and dynamic lighting to give the processor and GPU some breathing room.

Even more so for devices with 8GB of RAM, perhaps medium/low settings would be ideal at 720p.

If you encounter visual and graphical bugs with dxvk Switch to Wine3d in the container, test this initial container configuration. The dxvk is version 1.10.3; if it doesn't work with that, use version 1.7.3. If that still fails, switch back to Wine3d and use the same dxvks. starting with version 1.10.3 and then 1.7.3 if the first one fails.

container.envVars: WRAPPER_MAX_IMAGE_COUNT=0 ZINK_DESCRIPTORS=lazy ZINK_DEBUG=compact MESA_SHADER_CACHE_DISABLE=false MESA_SHADER_CACHE_MAX_SIZE=512MB mesa_glthread=true WINEESYNC=1 PULSE_LATENCY_MSEC=40 WRAPPER_NO_PATCH_OPCONSTCOMP=1
